ticket_title: BE - Replace booleans/strings with typed enums in SubscriberActivation process state

test_cases.name: TC-1: New-account Handset activation (Dealer/PSIM/NewNumber/IDV Validated) completes end-to-end [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: RTGO Backend deployed with story/RTPL-1912; Metro API sandbox available; clean activation state. | Test Data: role = Store Rep, storeType = COR, deviceType = Handset, inventoryType = D (ASTOCK), simType = PSIM, mdnType = NewNumber, idvType = Validated

steps.action: Initiate new subscriber activation for a Handset (Dealer ASTOCK inventory).
Validate IMEI via Metro API; confirm DeviceType=Handset and InventoryType=Dealer in process state.
Validate PSIM; confirm SimType=PSIM in SimCardValidationDetails.
Configure MDN with a new number; confirm MdnType=NewNumber in MdnConfigDetails.
Complete IDV as Validated; confirm IdvType=Validated in line state snapshot.
Complete payment and full activation.
steps.expected: Activation succeeds end-to-end; all enum properties are set correctly; no NullReferenceException or EnumParseException is thrown; Metro API receives correct boundary string constants.

test_cases.name: TC-2: BYOD Handset with eSIM and port-in MDN — InventoryType=Byod, SimType=ESIM, MdnType=PortIn [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: BYOD Handset device available; port-in MDN scenario configured in test env. | Test Data: deviceType = Handset, inventoryType = Byod (BYOD), simType = ESIM, mdnType = PortIn, idvType = Validated

steps.action: Initiate activation for a BYOD Handset.
Validate device; confirm InventoryType=Byod replaces removed IsByod boolean in state.
Validate eSIM; confirm SimType=ESIM replaces removed IsESim boolean.
Configure MDN for port-in; confirm MdnType=PortIn replaces removed string "PortIn".
Complete activation and verify Metro API request payload uses correct boundary string constants.
steps.expected: InventoryType=Byod, SimType=ESIM, MdnType=PortIn are all set correctly; Metro API receives correct string values at API boundary (via constant mapping); no NullReferenceException.

test_cases.name: TC-3: IDV Invalid path — IdvType=Invalid captured; downstream routing correct [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: Metro API IDV check configured to return Invalid outcome. | Test Data: idvType = Invalid, role = Store Rep, storeType = COR

steps.action: Initiate a new-account activation.
Trigger IDV flow; configure Metro API stub to return an Invalid result.
Inspect process state for IdvType value.
Confirm activation engine routes per the Invalid IDV business rules (rep acknowledgement / escalation).
steps.expected: Process state captures IdvType=Invalid; routing for Invalid IDV proceeds correctly; no runtime error from removed bool IsIdentityValidated.

test_cases.name: TC-4: Tablet (ASTOCK) — DeviceType=Tablet correct after IsTablet boolean removal [Priority: Medium]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: Tablet IMEI available in test env; A-Stock tablet auto-reactivation path exercisable. | Test Data: deviceType = Tablet, inventoryType = D (ASTOCK), role = Store Rep, storeType = COR

steps.action: Initiate activation for a Tablet (ASTOCK).
Validate IMEI via Metro API.
Inspect DeviceValidationDetails for DeviceType value.
Confirm A-Stock tablet auto-reactivation routing is not regressed.
steps.expected: DeviceType=Tablet is set correctly; removed IsTablet bool causes no NullReferenceException; tablet-specific routing (auto-reactivation check) behaves as before.

test_cases.name: TC-5: In-flight CosmosDB event with legacy boolean fields deserializes correctly after deploy [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: CosmosDB test instance contains a persisted activation event with old boolean fields (IsByod=true, IsESim=true, IsReactivation=false). | Test Data: Legacy event JSON: IsByod=true expected InventoryType=Byod; IsESim=true expected SimType=ESIM; TransactionType=Activation expected from IsReactivation=false

steps.action: Deploy story/RTPL-1912 to test environment.
Load an in-flight activation process from CosmosDB that was persisted with legacy boolean fields.
Resume the activation process.
Inspect deserialized DeviceValidationDetails for InventoryType and SimType values.
Confirm process continues without deserialization error.
steps.expected: JsonConverter attributes map legacy booleans to correct enum values; activation resumes without data loss or exception.
